Comment.val: 0:硬貨・紙幣有効, 1:紙幣無効, 2:硬貨無効, 3:硬貨・紙幣無効
:取得失敗？, 0:待機, 1:異常, 2:リセット, 3:入金(釣銭先行モード), 4:入金, 5:補充入金, 6:フル回収, 7:出金, 8:回収(紙幣全回収／硬貨全回収), 9:単金種回収, A:紙幣／硬貨一部回収, B:精査中, C:省電力モード, D:初期設定, E:停電検知, F:ＲＡＳモード
:取得失敗？, 0:入金禁止, 1:入金許可, 2:釣銭先行モード
0:エンプティ, 1:ニアエンプティ, 2:適量, 3:ニアフル, 4:フル, 5:収納なし
0:通常, 1:ニアエンプティ, 2:エンプティ, 4:ニアフル, 8:フル
1:紙幣回収庫フル 2:紙幣回収庫検知 4:紙幣回収庫セット 8:紙幣回収庫ふた開

Text.val: ◆ 初期処理(ハンドル未指定だったら)
◆ 金額指定放出処理(上記Openに成功したら)
◆ 終了処理(ハンドル未指定だったら)

ExpSyntax.val: HStr (ASCIIVal (MIDV ({0,19},7,1)) MOD HVal ('30'))&HStr (ASCIIVal (MIDV ({0,19},8,1)) MOD HVal ('30'))&HStr (ASCIIVal (MIDV ({0,19},9,1)) MOD HVal ('30'))&HStr (ASCIIVal (MIDV ({0,19},10,1)) MOD HVal ('30'))

Range (ASCIIVal (MIDV ({0,19},13,1)),HVal ('30'),HVal ('3F')) AND Range (ASCIIVal (MIDV ({0,19},16,1)),HVal ('30'),HVal ('3F')) AND Range (ASCIIVal (MIDV ({0,19},19,1)),HVal ('30'),HVal ('3F')) AND Range (ASCIIVal (MIDV ({0,19},22,1)),HVal ('30'),HVal ('3F'))

Range (ASCIIVal (MIDV ({0,19},14,1)),HVal ('30'),HVal ('3F')) AND Range (ASCIIVal (MIDV ({0,19},17,1)),HVal ('30'),HVal ('3F')) AND Range (ASCIIVal (MIDV ({0,19},20,1)),HVal ('30'),HVal ('3F')) AND Range (ASCIIVal (MIDV ({0,19},23,1)),HVal ('30'),HVal ('3F'))

Range (ASCIIVal (MIDV ({0,19},15,1)),HVal ('30'),HVal ('3F')) AND Range (ASCIIVal (MIDV ({0,19},18,1)),HVal ('30'),HVal ('3F')) AND Range (ASCIIVal (MIDV ({0,19},21,1)),HVal ('30'),HVal ('3F')) AND Range (ASCIIVal (MIDV ({0,19},24,1)),HVal ('30'),HVal ('3F'))

HStr (ASCIIVal (MIDV ({0,19},51,1)) MOD HVal ('30'))&HStr (ASCIIVal (MIDV ({0,19},52,1)) MOD HVal ('30'))&HStr (ASCIIVal (MIDV ({0,19},53,1)) MOD HVal ('30'))&HStr (ASCIIVal (MIDV ({0,19},54,1)) MOD HVal ('30'))
